---
title: "Publishing Quarto OERs"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Modular-Sandpit.html"
  text: "Sandpit"

next:
  href: "../index.html"
  text: "Home"
---

Options include:

-   GitHub Pages for free public hosting;

-   Quarto Pub for simple deployment;

-   Institutional repositories, including rendered output and source (.qmd and supporting files);

-   Packaging OERs for more advanced reuse.

[![](images/clipboard-3722003544.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: ../index.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/index.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
